textByHash.0ff239fdf0f8c257b5db7b3c4615de0aee3b6122: I am Metzli, Teokan of Ranul. You I already know. You are the one that saved the life of my counterpart.
textByHash.1236cc8edfc4ee2eac82c994e823f299d5fc253d: It is said that they are amongst those with this belief.
textByHash.350763b22c607d86e99e50ccb5b737598b2730a0: Yes... and no. This is our first encounter, and yet I know you better than most. You wear the face of my only true companion. You wear the face of death.
textByHash.38a3ebe1974192adf149d165a2c79d0f28759ed6: Yes. As Teokan of Ranul, I lead the Sect of Ranul. My counterpart, Servius, leads the Church of Ralos.
textByHash.3bb8903a9c92c8453feb774b3f2d52aa037d3069: We call them the Old Ones. They understood the importance of passing on their knowledge. So much of what we know, comes from them.
textByHash.40d2bb8d552fa16eef9a2f87d22aa5121551ed49: You jest, as your kind often do. Is that how you drown out their screams, I wonder? Is that how you hide your pain?
textByHash.4cb6717bd386e5f113398b7c2eb594bcaa84b16d: The Final Dawn? This is something I can help with, but first, to understand the Final Dawn, you must understand Ximoua.
textByHash.51133e856d3e6458a91511d5c1f145112f145d82: But even in ash, embers remain. From those embers, a new world will be born, and the cycle will continue once more. This is Ximoua.
textByHash.54a962a0ba24818ba5c0ce4739dc93688ece299b: Few seek an introduction with the Sect of Ranul. They spend their days in Ralos' light. The darkness hides an inevitable truth that they prefer to shy away from.
textByHash.59194f253fb6e116c77edecf6f09a7e18e6eef6d: The Prince and my counterpart wish to speak with you. You should go to them at once.
textByHash.5c6ce6c5c1a7e7c3dff505ad6aaad22d99c3f4a2: The word is a gift to us from those who walked these lands before we did. They knew the truths of this world... in a way we can only dream of.
textByHash.6abd131c5e26788da64fd9a4d4069271aa2a8400: They do not just believe that the world will end. They believe it is their duty to make it happen. They see it as their singular purpose, and will stop at nothing to make it so.
textByHash.719029b6ca68aaad648aedb393f681726116d452: Our world endures in a way we cannot comprehend, but like all things, it will not do so forever. Its light will one day die, but this is not something to be feared, it is something to be embraced.
textByHash.72b5c37319494888087afb1f80977a542083d5f3: We meet again. Not a chance encounter I see, for it is clear that you want something.
textByHash.75173dd5159b9b218a001ef5f84dc5ede5762f00: But what is a book without the right reader? Words can be misunderstood, misconstrued. That assumes those words were even right to begin with.
textByHash.7b2b30d466f9f3fb100e23aaa12c639767b30673: Yes. They understood the importance of passing on their knowledge. So much of what we know, comes from them.
textByHash.809e782d0c35dd98517e01b93327917f5b5b6b3a: Not think. Know. This knowledge is a gift. One that was passed down to us from the Old Ones.
textByHash.80b8a288a4ea2b6d9663e6a16fee8d0b91ca06d0: Ralos' light can be found all across Varlamore, but when that light fades, there is only one who can guide us through the darkness.
textByHash.82b8882503af61200ddcffd58e0bf4ad16598d69: When the sun sets, it is he that will guide us. He will lead us through the Gates of Mictl to where we may finally rest. The duty of the Sect of Ranul is to ensure that all are prepared for that journey.
textByHash.8b8a8aaab91b937282cf9e0e870ca6f400ddaa01: You see, we are part of a cycle. Something far larger than ourselves. When the time comes, Ralos and Ranul will come together as one, consuming these lands in holy fire, until there is nothing left but ash.
textByHash.9371599c287bb7eae6dbfed09ca1aa678aa2a5f7: Yes you are. He is speaking with Servius, down in the crypt. Not a place you'd normally find the Teokan of Ralos, but the Prince desired the privacy only Ranul can offer.
textByHash.998b7f713c3c57fd56c27bf5cfb5a441fa91f5b9: Quite possibly. The Sect of Ranul know better than most that time sees the end of all things. When we are gone, what remains? Knowledge must be passed on, lest it be lost forever.
textByHash.a9e070e19b946656febe6a2ba19e5b5af5145990: Think of all that we believe to know. All those words we have read. How many were the truth, I wonder.
textByHash.b2f88044518abe9f62d404f0bbbffdbba90ca572: Indeed, and that is why this is just one interpretation. There are those out there with another: Tsak Tauli, the Final Dawn.
textByHash.c85cc6e4345bfbe225c81d42075a0f3f9c53d326: If you wish to learn more, you should seek out Servius or one of his Teoki. They will be better placed to guide you than I, for my duty is one of darkness, not light.
textByHash.d88865fadf61338b3266892f2220ecf187eabe89: Those who worship the light can be found throughout these lands, and it is the Church of Ralos that leads their worship.
textByHash.db483a478260392441128f772da835b4f4d8daff: The Prince awaits you down in the crypt.
textByHash.f06a05cad070181e5f142328cb57d7eaeaa56c0e: Yes. You will not find many worshippers of Ranul in your travels. Indeed, many choose to hide from him their whole lives, but no matter what, we will all meet Ranul in the end.
textByHash.f82c7f9cd921f5eb025760155198569fbc108a92: I know your face. I have seen it a thousand times before.
